---
title: "intent.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/node/gateway/routes/api/intent.ts"
loc: 42
complexity: 3
logic_score: 7.60
style_score: 3.90
intel_score: 3.90
overall_score: 5.14
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 3 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)

## ⛩️ API Gateways
- `[POST] /intent`


## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [FastifyInstance](file://fastify)
- [Type](file://@sinclair/typebox)
- [Static](file://@sinclair/typebox)

### Exports
- `IntentSchema`
- `fastify`
- `fastify`
- `router`
